title: Craftable heads
description: Craftable Heads is a mod that lets you craft mob and player heads using simple recipes. Perfect for decoration, trophies, and custom maps.
body:
Craftable Heads adds crafting recipes for mob and player heads. Instead of relying on rare drops.

You can now easily craft heads for decoration, trophies, or events. Simple, lightweight, and perfect for survival and server use!
